title: West Pharmaceutical (WST) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: DCF analysis for West Pharmaceutical (WST) based on its stable cash generation and niche dominance in injectable drug packaging.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate
fcfGrowth.rationale: Given its strong competitive position and a free cash flow generation of 273,875,008, WST has stable forward visibility. A conservative 8% growth rate is applied over the next decade, accounting for steady biologic pipeline expansion.
